title: Corpse Reborn
description:
After your death a corpse will spawn. You need to find your corpse to be revived.

WORKS IN MULTIPLAYER
body:
This datapack adds a new death/afterlife mechanic. 
When you die a body in place where you died will be spawned.
You need to find your body to be respawned in place where you died.

You can teleport across dimension just by flying belor or above bedrock.

This is remake of my older datapack called WOW Like Death System.



Have fun!



P.S. If you found any bugs PLEASE send me a message to my discord account
